breakdown: PR adds CR approval fallback logic to Skeptic Gates workflows: when no formal CR review exists, it now checks CodeRabbit status checks on commits and [approve] bot comments. Improves error handling with explicit exit code capture using set +e -o pipefail. Also broadens bot username matching to include both coderabbitai[bot] and coderabbitai. Shell scripting makes type safety not applicable; test coverage absent as expected for workflow changes.
key_changes: Add fallback to CR status check on commit (not just PR review)
Add fallback to CR [approve] bot comment detection
Add explicit exit code handling with set +e -o pipefail
Broaden bot username matching from coderabbitai[bot] to include coderabbitai
Filter CR status checks by context 'CodeRabbit' without success requirement in fallback path
